text: Strengthen your digital resilience with the MCZ subsidy. [Knowledge article](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/cybersecurity/actueel.html). [Cybersecurity](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/cybersecurity/veilig/index.html). 04/09/2025 • 3 minutes reading. ABN AMRO Editorial.

metadata.source_title: Strengthen your digital resilience with the MCZ subsidy

text: As an entrepreneur you want to move forward. Serving new customers, streamlining your processes, strengthening your team.

metadata.source_title: Strengthen your digital resilience with the MCZ subsidy

text: But in this digital age there is an invisible danger lurking: cyber attacks. They increasingly affect SMEs and can not only paralyze your systems, but also damage your reputation. Fortunately, there is now a way to better protect your company against these risks – with the help of the MCZ subsidy. Why cybersecurity deserves priority. Cybercrime is no longer something that only affects large companies. Small and medium-sized enterprises in particular are increasingly becoming targets.

metadata.source_title: Strengthen your digital resilience with the MCZ subsidy
Strengthen your digital resilience with the MCZ subsidy

text: Because they are often less secure, even though they manage valuable data and resources. A cyber attack can easily cause tens of thousands of euros in damage and often brings your business operations to a standstill. Investing in cybersecurity pays off.

metadata.source_title: Strengthen your digital resilience with the MCZ subsidy
Strengthen your digital resilience with the MCZ subsidy

text: ABN AMRO: your partner in safety. As a bank, we understand how important it is to make the right choices when it comes to cybersecurity.

metadata.source_title: Strengthen your digital resilience with the MCZ subsidy

text: That is why we would like to think along with you.

metadata.source_title: Strengthen your digital resilience with the MCZ subsidy
Strengthen your digital resilience with the MCZ subsidy

text:
Getting started with the MCZ subsidy in 5 steps
Step 1: Check if you qualify. Your company must meet three conditions. Maximum 50 employees, less than € 10 million annual turnover and a Chamber of Commerce registration.

metadata.source_title: Strengthen your digital resilience with the MCZ subsidy

text: Step 2: Complete the CyberSafe Check. The [CyberSafe Check](https://tools.digitaltrustcenter.nl/cyberveilig-check/) from the Digital Trust Center is mandatory. Complete this for the most relevant investments and download the advice as a PDF, without this document your application will be rejected. Step 3: Invest smartly in your digital security.

metadata.source_title: Strengthen your digital resilience with the MCZ subsidy

text: Now you choose which measures you take.

metadata.source_title: Strengthen your digital resilience with the MCZ subsidy

text: You do not have to immediately follow all the advice from the CyberSafe Check, but it is a good guideline. Our cybersecurity experts are happy to help you with this. Step 4: Save your supporting documents. Make sure your invoice contains all required information and preferably pay by bank for a direct bank statement. Step 5: Submit your application. Registrations have been open since July 18, 2025. You can submit your application via RVO with your eHerkenning (minimum level 2+). The deadline is October 31, 2025.

metadata.source_title: Strengthen your digital resilience with the MCZ subsidy

text: Working together for a safe future. Curious how we can support you?

metadata.source_title: Strengthen your digital resilience with the MCZ subsidy

text:
View our cybersecurity solutions or contact our specialists. Together we make your company resilient to cyber threats. Take cyber measures yourself or report fraud? About 1 in 5 entrepreneurs is confronted with cybercrime. Such a cyber incident can have major consequences for business operations, customers, suppliers or reputation. Taking appropriate measures is therefore important for every company. Do you have an SME company and do you want to reduce your cyber risks? Then take a look at [Cyber ​​Fundament](https://doorpassen.abnamro.nl/producten-en-diensten/cyber-voor-het-mkb/), especially for SME entrepreneurs. Learn more about the 4-in-1 cyber solution [Cyber ​​Safe & Secure](https://doorpassen.abnamro.nl/producten-en-diensten/cyber-veilig-en-zeker/?icmp=cm-od_article-insights_btn-link) especially for large businesses and reduce your cyber risks. Do you also want to [do business safely](https://doorpassen.abnamro.nl/producten-en-diensten/veilig-ondernemen/?icmp=cm-od_article-insights_btn-link)? View smart tools, useful articles and cyber webinars.
[Report fraud to us](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/prive/abnamro/veilig-banken/fraude-melden.html "Report fraud"), even if in doubt, after which our helpdesk will help you immediately. Tags.
